## Summary

Describe the change clearly and concisely.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor/chore

## Validation

List tests/checks run locally (with commands):

- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Docs updated (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I have updated docs for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where relevant.
